value_picks.name: Dow Inc.
value_picks.why_undervalued: Down 42% in 2025 due to cyclical chemical trough and dividend cut, trading near multi-year lows with BBB balance sheet and positive FCF.
value_picks.bull_case: Specialties portfolio provides durable cash flows; dividend capitulation signals bottom, recovery with economic cycle in 2027.

value_picks.name: LyondellBasell Industries
value_picks.why_undervalued: 42% YTD decline amid commodity weakness, high yield but debt issuance signals stress; near 52w lows.
value_picks.bull_case: Leading chemical producer with strong payout; post-dividend cut setup for rebound like peers.

value_picks.name: Clorox Co.
value_picks.why_undervalued: 39% down in 2025 as consumer staples laggard, stable franchise at depressed multiples.
value_picks.bull_case: Essential brands with pricing power; beaten down staples recover with consumer stabilization.

value_picks.name: Charter Communications
value_picks.why_undervalued: Ongoing subscriber losses but <6x EBITDA valuation after multi-year decline.
value_picks.bull_case: Broadband monopoly cash cow; stable revenues support high FCF yield.

value_picks.name: Alexandria Real Estate Equities
value_picks.why_undervalued: 50% drop on dividend cut and life sciences overhang, leverage 6x but strong tenants.
value_picks.bull_case: Premier lab space REIT with Moderna etc.; demand recovers post-patent cliffs.

momentum_picks.name: Sandisk Corp.
momentum_picks.catalyst: Spinoff from Western Digital with explosive demand for enterprise SSDs in AI data centers, up 559% in 2025.
momentum_picks.risk_reward: High valuation but AI storage tailwinds outweigh pullback risks.

momentum_picks.name: Western Digital
momentum_picks.catalyst: AI-driven HDD demand surge, 27% revenue growth, top 2025 S&P performer up 238%.
momentum_picks.risk_reward: Reasonable fwd P/E positions for continued outperformance.

momentum_picks.name: Micron Technology
momentum_picks.catalyst: Record Q1 FY2026 revenue +57% YoY on AI memory boom, #3 S&P gainer 2025.
momentum_picks.risk_reward: Profitable turnaround with 40% margins limits downside.

momentum_picks.name: Seagate Technology
momentum_picks.catalyst: Mass-capacity storage for AI/cloud, up 220% in 2025 as top gainer.

momentum_picks.name: Robinhood Markets
momentum_picks.catalyst: Crypto/AI trading volumes boom, +191-215% in 2025 on user growth.
momentum_picks.risk_reward: Retail trading volatility high but platform stickiness strong.

watchlist_updates.detail: Workday hit new 52-week low not seen since August 2024 per CNBC Jan 2 report.
Pool Corp at lows not seen since May 2020.
Copart at lows not seen since April 2023.
Paycom at lows not seen since September 2024.
Roper at lows not seen since March 2023.
Micron at record highs dating back to IPO; up over 7% on Friday.
Vertiv upgraded from underweight to overweight with PT raised $19 to $200.
Sandisk up on strong data center demand narrative post Western Digital spin.
Tesla Q4 deliveries 418k (-16% YoY) but above whisper; Wedbush maintains Outperform PT $600.
